headline: Mastercard (MA) To Report Earnings Tomorrow: Here Is What To Expect

headline: Visa Stock Soars Because AI Agents Will Pay With Cards
summary: Visa stock leapt on Wednesday morning, leading the Dow Jones Industrial Average.  The surge came after it blew away fiscal second-quarter earnings forecasts late Tuesday on its strongest revenue growth since 2022.  The digital payment network, long seen as a potential casualty of fintech innovation, provided a shot of confidence that it will be a long-term winner in the AI era.

headline: GuardCap Dumps Nearly Half Its Yum China (YUMC) Position
summary: Yum China operates over 12,000 restaurants across 1,700 cities, serving a broad menu through brands like KFC, Pizza Hut, and Taco Bell.

headline: Visa Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates on Payment Volume Strength

headline: Still believe bitcoin will be worth $1 million or more in the long run: Lightspark's David Marcus
summary: David Marcus, Lightspark co-founder and CEO, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the launch of a new global banking platform, Bitcoin 2026 conference, state of crypto, his thoughts on prediction markets, and more.

headline: Mastercard Extends AI Agent And Crypto Payment Rails For Future Commerce
summary: Mastercard (NYSE:MA) is rolling out Agent Pay and Verifiable Intent to support trusted, network-backed payments for autonomous AI agents on leading open agent platforms. The company is extending these AI agent capabilities through integrations with Lobster.cash and OpenClaw to manage authorization and oversight of agent initiated transactions. In Australia, Mastercard is partnering with KuCoin to enable direct crypto payments for everyday purchases, linking digital asset wallets to real...
